programme.desc: How many ways there are to embarrass, injure and humiliate yourself when jumping into a bin, attempting to breathe fire or firing paintballs at each other.

programme.title: Science of Stupid Extreme Sports S1 E31

programme.title: Science of Stupid 6 S6 E16
programme.desc: In this episode we learn the science behind hurricanes, the secrets to skiing a box rail, and how to run backwards without humiliating yourself.

programme.title: Science of Stupid 6 S6 E17
programme.desc: In this episode we learn all about surface tension, the best way to catch a drone, how to foot grab a Pogo Stick, and the secrets behind bike river jumps.

programme.desc: This Science of Stupid episode is dedicated to cats and other friends who prove that although they lack opposable thumbs, they fare quite well when measured against humans.

programme.title: Science of Stupid Compilations S2 E10
programme.desc: Dallas Campbell uses the ruler of science to measure what separates a champion from a looser in legendary sports like basketball, volleyball and newer stuff like street luge.

programme.title: Science of Stupid Compilations S2 E11
programme.desc: With the help of animations and slo-mo cinematography, Dallas Campbell demonstrates how not to crash when driving a snowmobile and how to avoid falling flat on your behind when walking in thin ice.

programme.title: Science of Stupid Compilations S2 E12
programme.desc: Dallas Campbell analyzes what happens when instead of making our life easier we complicate things, using science to explain what happens when you go under a bridge that is too low for your vehicle.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans S1 E4

programme.desc: Vikrant tells Aish he has no feelings for Mallika, which enrages her. She attacks Mannat and traps her inside cold storage, leaving Mannat's fate uncertain.

programme.title: Kulfi - The Singing Star
programme.desc: Sikander and Loveleen express love through music, while Tevar's presence irritates Loveleen. Amid the celebration, Kullfi prepares a thoughtful and heartfelt gift for Loveleen.

programme.title: Strange Love

programme.title: Advocate Anjali Awasthi

programme.title: In the Line of Duty 4
programme.desc: The fourth installment in the Royal Sisters series, depicting the struggle between a female police officer and criminals.

programme.title: Maya the Bee Movie
programme.desc: The adventure story of Maya the Bee, exploring the outside world.

programme.title: Boys and Grils Go Go Go
programme.desc: It is a large-scale outdoor competitive reality show, with wonderful race tracks for men and women, numerous levels of water games.

programme.title: Kungfu Movie Club
programme.desc: Watch the best part of the latest kungfu movies within 30 minutes.,Stories behind the movie!

programme.title: Conjuring the Genie 2
programme.desc: An aspiring novelist soon finds the deadly reality behind the legend of a Wishmaker.

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: Dr. Ellie Arroway, after years of searching, finds conclusive radio proof of extraterrestrial intelligence, sending plans for a mysterious machine.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: A former fireman takes on a group of terrorists holding the Vice President and others hostage during the seventh game of the NHL Stanley Cup finals.

programme.title: The Curse of Audrey Earnshaw
programme.desc: A devout community suffering from a plague is torn apart by a beautiful young woman and the forces of witchcraft, black magic, and possession.

programme.title: The Patrol
programme.desc: Written and directed by former soldier, Tom Petch, 'The Patrol' provides the antidote to the war action film. A psychological drama, the film explores the relationships between a group of British soldiers as they grow disillusioned with the Afghan war.

programme.title: The Exorcism
programme.desc: A troubled actor begins to exhibit a disruptive behavior while shooting a horror film. His estranged daughter wonders if he's slipping back into his past addictions or if there's something more sinister at play.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled
programme.desc: In the south of France, former special-ops mercenary Frank Martin enters into a game of chess with a femme-fatale and her three sidekicks who are looking for revenge against a sinister Russian kingpin.

programme.title: The Messenger: The Story of Joan of Arc
programme.desc: A young girl receives a vision that drives her to rid France of its oppressors.

programme.title: Uncle Peckerhead
programme.desc: When a punk band scores their first tour, life on the road proves tough when they are joined by a man-eating demon as a roadie.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In a future world devastated by disease, a convict is sent back in time to gather information about the man-made virus that wiped out most of the human population on the planet.

programme.title: Carnera: The Walking Mountain
programme.desc: The life of Primo Carnera a.k.a. "Ambling Alp", Italian professional boxer and the World Heavyweight Champion from June 1933 to June 1934, but also accused by some of having ties to the mob.

programme.title: Carnera: The Walking Mountain
programme.desc: The life of Primo Carnera a.k.a. "Ambling Alp", Italian professional boxer and the World Heavyweight Champion from June 1933 to June 1934, but also accused by some of having ties to the mob.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: In 2027, in a chaotic world in which women have somehow become infertile, a former activist agrees to help transport a miraculously pregnant woman to a sanctuary at sea.

programme.title: Thousand Plane Raid
programme.desc: The dramatic story of the bombing of the German city of Cologne. Polish refugee pilots join the British officers of the Royal Air Force to fly in a historic bomber stream that turned the war in favor of the Allies.

programme.title: R.I.P.D. 2: Rise of the Damned
programme.desc: Recruited by the R.I.P.D., a resurrected sheriff returns to Earth to save humanity from a gateway to hell.

programme.title: The Golem
programme.desc: During an outbreak of a deadly plague in Lithuania, a mystical woman must save her tight-knit Jewish community from a gang of ruffians led by a local landowner, but the entity she conjures to protect them is a far greater evil.

programme.title: Nikita
programme.desc: Convicted felon Nikita isn't going to jail; she's given a new identity and trained, stylishly, as a top secret spy/assassin.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: In the year 2019, a plague has transformed almost every human into vampires. Faced with a dwindling blood supply, the fractured dominant race plots their survival; meanwhile, a researcher works with a covert band of vamps on a way to save humankind.

programme.title: Michael Jackson
programme.desc: Searching for Neverland will reveal firsthand the devotion Michael Jackson had to his children, and the hidden drama that took place during the last two years of his life.

programme.title: Ghost Webcam
programme.desc: A young man under house arrest and his friends are haunted by an unknown force after logging onto a website that broadcasts images from a haunted room.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.Firefight
programme.desc: Detroit PD borrows an LA SWAT leader as instructor for 2 weeks training of their SWAT team. After a real SWAT action, a madman with special skills, obsessed with "revenge", is released on bail.

programme.title: Antwone Fisher
programme.desc: Antwone Fisher, a young navy man, is forced to see a psychiatrist after a violent outburst against a fellow crewman. During the course of treatment a painful past is revealed and a new hope begins.

programme.title: Storms Over Georgia
programme.desc: In the middle of Sherman's March, in eastern Georgia, Confederate infantry, cavalry, and artillery make a bold stand against the overwhelming numbers of the Union army as it tears across Georgia.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: A fallen warrior rises against a corrupt and sadistic ruler to avenge his dishonored master.

programme.title: Moonfall
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the moon from its orbit and sends it hurtling on a collision course toward earth.

programme.title: It's Okay to not be Okay E4
programme.desc: It follows Mia, a woman diagnosed with an antisocial personality disorder, who gets romantically involved with Patpat, a psych ward caretaker, who has dedicated his life to taking care of his autistic older brother Matmat.

programme.title: Arabella E1
programme.desc: AraBella follows Roselle's search for her lost daughter, Bella, who is now a con artist.

programme.title: Deceit E28
programme.desc: Victor "Bangis" Lualhati has always been a fighter. As a former boxer, he gets used to overcoming obstacles through tough times. When he finds a suspicious message on his wife's phone, he'll be faced with a challenge he never saw coming.,Deceit

programme.desc: Um jovem chamado Tanggol torna-se um dos maiores bandidos do bairro enquanto trilha o seu caminho na vida para sobreviver em Quiapo, Manila. Na esperança de conquistar o afeto dos pais, o seu feito aproxima-o da verdade sobre a sua identidade.

programme.desc: A feliz vida familiar de uma detetive de polícia muda quando ela começa a descobrir a identidade secreta do marido. Sua equipe investiga um caso de assassinato ligado ao homem que ela ama, o que a leva a uma revelação devastadora.

programme.desc: Simone Simon interprète une belle mais humble Française qui enseigne à des femmes plus aisées à combattre pour leur pays dans Mademoiselle Fifi.

programme.title: Vivre libre
programme.desc: Albert se retrouve devant un tribunal, accusé à tort de meurtre. Seul contre le pouvoir du Troisième Reich, cet homme apparemment faible va révéler une âme invincible.

programme.title: Dunkerque
programme.desc: Londres, mai 1940. Charles Forman, correspondant de guerre, signe un engagement avec la Marine Marchande et se porte volontaire pour la plus grande mission jamais préparée ... l'évacuation de Dunkerque.

programme.title: En Suivant la flotte
programme.desc: Bake Baker est amoureux de Sherry Martin, sa partenaire dans un numéro de danse. Mais quand il lui demande de l'épouser, elle refuse. Par dépit, il s'engage dans la marine…

programme.title: Obsession
programme.desc: Deux trapézistes, Hélène et Aldo, se marient. Aldo confie alors à sa femme que, plusieurs années auparavant, il a tué un homme. Ce coupable souvenir ne ternit pas le bonheur du couple jusqu'au jour où réapparaît Alex, unique témoin du meurtre.

programme.title: La Vénus des mers chaudes (Version restaurée)
Vacances à Venise
programme.desc: Jane Hudson, une américaine, passe des vacances seule en Italie. Un enfant des rues, Mauro, lui fait découvrir quelques recoins de la ville de Venise où elle a déposé ses valises.

programme.title: La Chute de la maison Usher
Roger Corman, le pape du pop cinema
Electric Dreams
programme.desc: Une succession de curieux incidents perturbent Edgar, le micro ordinateur domestique que vient d'acquérir Miles, un jeune architecte. Le cerveau informatique se voit petit à petit doté d'émotions humaines dont il fait l'apprentissage avec finesse.

programme.desc: Rajnath tells Jagadhatri and Swayambhu to leave the Mukherjee residence. However, Jagadhatri refuses and asks him to accept Swayambhu's fatherhood.

programme.title: Badla
programme.desc: Naina, a successful entrepreneur and married woman, gets caught in a web of accusations when her lover is found dead. She then hires a reputable lawyer to work with her on the case and find answers.

programme.desc: Despite rejection, Srinu refuses to give up, believing her silence reveals the truth. Adhya sacrifices her love for family obligations, while Srinu decides he cannot live without her.

programme.desc: Sweetu stealthily teaches Omkar how to cook. The Salvis go to Omkar's house for lunch. Malavika overhears Omkar and Shaku's conversation and tells Mohit about it.
